nodes.name: Cron: Daily at Midnight IST (18:30 UTC)

parameters.query: SELECT s.id, s.title, p.username AS creator, MAX(ml.viewer_count) AS peak_viewers, SUM(ml.message_count_per_minute) AS total_messages FROM stream_metadata_log ml JOIN streams s ON s.id = ml.stream_id JOIN profiles p ON p.id = s.creator_id WHERE ml.recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY s.id, s.title, p.username ORDER BY peak_viewers DESC LIMIT 10

INSERT INTO daily_digests (digest_date, top_streams) VALUES ('{{ $json.digest_date }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.top_streams) }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (digest_date) DO UPDATE SET top_streams = EXCLUDED.top_streams
